description: Convert one immutable text input into an uppercase output.

objective_contract.target: result.txt in the isolated task workspace
objective_contract.decision: whether result.txt exactly equals the uppercase input

acceptance_criteria.description: result.txt exactly equals the uppercase input

command: from pathlib import Path; i=Path('input.txt').read_text(); r=Path('result.txt').read_text(); assert r == i.upper()

task_template.objective: Create result.txt containing the uppercase form of input.txt while preserving the final newline.

operations.failure_response: Inspect the failed gate artifact, repair the blueprint or implementation, increment the version, and recertify.
